message.content: {"items":[{"title":"German Student Survey 1961","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.10713","justification":"Survey of students in higher education in Germany in 1961; covers higher and further education and aspects of social stratification among students."},{"title":"German Student Survey 1963","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.10714","justification":"Nationwide survey of German university students in 1963, focusing on higher education conditions and social background (social stratification) in Germany."},{"title":"German Student Survey 1966","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.10715","justification":"Survey of students at German higher education institutions in 1966; includes questions on study conditions, political attitudes and social origin in Germany during the 1960s."},{"title":"German Student Survey 1969","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.10716","justification":"1969 wave of the German student survey series, covering higher education, political attitudes, and social background of students in Germany at the end of the 1960s."},{"title":"German General Election Study 1961","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.10727","justification":"Election study on the 1961 Bundestag election in the Federal Republic of Germany; focuses on political behaviour and attitudes and the political system in Germany."},{"title":"German General Election Study 1965","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.10728","justification":"Study of the 1965 Bundestag election in West Germany; includes citizens’ political behaviour, party preferences and attitudes towards government and political institutions."},{"title":"German General Election Study 1969","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.10729","justification":"Post‑election survey for the 1969 Bundestag election in West Germany; central for analysing political behaviour and attitudes and views on government and parties."},{"title":"ARD-DeutschlandTREND: Political Opinion Polls (West Germany) 1964–1969","url_or_doi":"https://dbk.gesis.org/dbksearch/sdesc2.asp?no=0400","justification":"Time series of political opinion polls in West Germany in the 1960s produced for ARD television; covers media context, political behaviour and attitudes, and views on government and parties."},{"title":"Mass Communication 1964 (West Germany)","url_or_doi":"https://dbk.gesis.org/dbksearch/sdesc2.asp?no=0440","justification":"Survey on media use and mass communication in West Germany in 1964; focuses on media consumption and attitudes towards mass media, relevant to the media domain."},{"title":"Social Stratification and Mobility in the Federal Republic of Germany 1969","url_or_doi":"https://dbk.gesis.org/dbksearch/sdesc2.asp?no=0700","justification":"Study of social stratification, occupational status and mobility in West Germany in 1969; directly addresses social stratification and groupings in the German context during the 1960s."}]}
